notes:
giàu means rich, wealthy — having a lot of money or assets. It’s an adjective.

It describes people, families, companies, even countries. It can also mean rich in something (not just money).

Close synonym: giàu có (a bit stronger/more formal).  
Opposite: nghèo (poor).
exampleSentences: Anh muốn làm việc chăm chỉ để trở nên giàu trong tương lai.
Chị ấy rất giàu nhưng vẫn sống giản dị và tốt bụng.
Nhiều người mơ ước được giàu để giúp đỡ gia đình mình.

translation.en: She wants to become rich in the future.

content.sentence: Cô ấy muốn trở nên ___ trong tương lai.

notes_md:
**giàu** means **rich, wealthy** — having a lot of money or assets. It’s an adjective.

It describes people, families, companies, even countries. It can also mean **rich in something** (not just money).


Close synonym: **giàu có** (a bit stronger/more formal).  
Opposite: **nghèo** (poor).

definitions.en: Having a lot of money or assets.
definitions.vi: Có nhiều tiền hoặc tài sản.

content.sentence: Anh ấy rất ___ và thông minh.

translation.en: He is very rich and smart.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I want to work hard to become rich in the future.
She is very rich but still lives simply and kindly.
Many people dream of being rich to help their families.
